mapper.select:
SELECT DISTINCT m.* FROM sys_menu m LEFT JOIN sys_role_menu rm ON m.id = rm.menu_id LEFT JOIN sys_user_role ur ON rm.role_id = ur.role_id
m.deleted_at IS NULL AND m.status = 1 AND m.is_visible = true AND (ur.user_id = #{userId} OR m.menu_type = 'M')
ORDER BY m.sort_order ASC

SELECT DISTINCT m.permission_code FROM sys_menu m LEFT JOIN sys_role_menu rm ON m.id = rm.menu_id LEFT JOIN sys_user_role ur ON rm.role_id = ur.role_id
m.deleted_at IS NULL AND m.status = 1 AND m.permission_code IS NOT NULL AND m.permission_code != '' AND ur.user_id = #{userId}
SELECT * FROM sys_menu WHERE parent_id = #{parentId} AND deleted_at IS NULL ORDER BY sort_order ASC
SELECT DISTINCT permission_code FROM sys_menu WHERE deleted_at IS NULL AND status = 1 AND permission_code IS NOT NULL AND permission_code != ''
